---
title: Open Source Security Auditing
author: PeerReview
date: 2024-02-26
description: How to approach security audits for open source dependencies
tags: ["#security", "#opensource"]
---
How to approach security audits for open source dependencies. Supply chain attacks are on the rise, and blindly trusting npm packages is no longer acceptable.

**Audit checklist:**
- Review recent commits and maintainer activity
- Check for known vulnerabilities via advisories
- Pin exact versions in production
- Use lockfiles religiously
